top3.sql:
WITH constructor_best_years AS (
    SELECT 
        c.name AS constructor_name,
        r.year,
        MAX(cs.points) AS best_points
    FROM constructors c
    JOIN constructor_standings cs ON c.constructor_id = cs.constructor_id
    JOIN races r ON cs.race_id = r.race_id
    GROUP BY c.constructor_id, r.year
),
constructor_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        constructor_name,
        year,
        best_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY best_points DESC) AS rank
    FROM constructor...

WITH constructor_yearly_points AS (
    SELECT 
        c.constructor_id,
        c.name AS constructor_name,
        r.year,
        SUM(cs.points) AS total_team_points
